title: Mc Spear-Mace Pvp
description: This modpack is a 1.21.11 Minecraft Mace-Spear or Spear-Mace utils modpack
body:
Spear PvP Performance & Competitive Combat Pack (1.21.11 Fabric)

A lightweight, high-performance Minecraft PvP modpack built for spear and crystal combat. Designed to maximize FPS, reduce input delay, and improve visibility in fast-paced PvP fights.

Includes optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and EntityCulling, along with PvP utilities such as totem counters, inventory HUD improvements, attack indicators, zoom tools, and crosshair enhancements.

Focused on competitive gameplay with clean visuals, minimal lag, and stable performance for duels, crystal PvP, and spear-based combat on Fabric 1.21.11.
